title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Tupperware India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Tupperware India
jsonLd.description:
We at Tupperware India are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Tupperware India:
Tupperware India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tupperware India!
